ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Ex Parte Application For Order For Expedited Discovery
Off Calendar Aug-11-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gia Cicone - Townsend Townsend and Crew (Counsel for Petitioners John Collins and Dale Matheny); Armon Cooper (Counsel for Respondent Mark Avery).

Ms. Cicone provided a brief description of the application request, to wit: 1) clarification of the Court's Order of August 2, 2006 re: Document Production Request, and 2) an out-of-state deposition of the Security Aviation corporate representative on shortend notice, all necessitated by Security Aviation's possible near-term insolvency.

Mr. Cooper noted that the matter was more properly heard by the Discovery Department but in any event denied the urgency of the matter, contending that the evidence presented by Ms. Cicone was either insufficient or incompetent to support the same. The Court concluded that while the matter was more properly heard by the Discovery Department, it was nevertheless empowered to hear the matter and found sufficient urgency to do so. Petitioner's counsel was directed to present future discovery requests to the Discovery Department.

Mr. Cooper presented a brief rebuttal to the Document Production Request issue and more extensive rebuttal to the shortened-time deposition request noting that Petitioners were requesting a deposition of an unrelated out-of-state third party and as such, the requirements of CCP Section 2026.010 must be met. In response, Ms. Cicone re-emphasized her earlier arguments and offered to present supplemental materials on Alaska deposition requirements within the hour, which offer was accepted by the Court (Mr. Cooper to respond as necessary).

The Court granted the application with respect to the document production request (documents to be produced no later than August 18, 2006) and took the deposition request under submission. An Order for issuance of a deposition commission was subsequently granted by written order.

Judicial Officer: Judge John Dearman; Reporter: Christina Paxton CSR# 1558; Court Examiner: Trudy Verzosa; Clerk: R. Michael Diles
